# `gold` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `GoldAsset`

```prisma
model GoldAsset {
  id                String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId            String
  type              String    @default("gold") // gold, jewelry, coin
  quantity          Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 4)
  unit              String    @default("gram") // gram, ounce, kg
  purchasePrice     Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  currentPrice      Decimal   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  purchaseDate      DateTime
  purityPercentage  Decimal   @default(99.9) @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  location          String?
  certificateNumber String?
  notes             String?
  clientRequestId   String?   @unique
  syncStatus        String    @default("synced")
  createdAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt         DateTime?
  user              User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([syncStatus])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@map("gold_assets")
  @@schema("public")
}
```
